## What is Monday CRM?

Monday CRM is a sales-focused extension of Monday.com. It builds on the familiar drag-and-drop interface and is tailored for sales pipelines, contacts, tasks, and automations — all visualized in a modular, board-based view.

## Who is it for?

Best for teams already using Monday.com or looking for an intuitive, low-friction entry into CRM. Particularly suitable for small to mid-sized teams that prioritize visual workflows.

## Strengths

- Seamless integration with Monday's broader work management tools
- Highly customizable board views for deals, contacts, activities
- Automation builder approachable even for non-tech users

## What to consider

- Not ideal for enterprise-scale sales orgs needing complex reporting
- Some features locked behind higher-tier plans
- Heavy customization might lead to inconsistencies without admin oversight

## Bottom line

Monday CRM offers an approachable, user-friendly CRM that leverages the visual flexibility of Monday.com's platform. Not the most powerful CRM, but provides enough structure for fast-moving teams who value usability.
